name: Bonduelle SCA
summary: Bonduelle SCA produces and sells vegetables and fruits in Europe and internationally. It offers canned, frozen, and ready-to-eat prepared and fresh-cut ready-to use vegetables, as well as prepared salads. The company provides its products under the Bonduelle, Cassegrain, Arctic Gardens, Globus, Ready Pac Foods, and Del Monte brands. Bonduelle SCA was founded in 1853 and is headquartered in Renescure, France.
